name: browser-use
description: Browser Use plugins for Claude Code.

plugins.name: browser-use
plugins.description: Give Claude a real browser — your Chrome or a Browser Use Cloud browser. Use it whenever a task involves a website or web app: browsing, scraping and data extraction, filling forms, testing sites, taking screenshots, automating web workflows.

plugins.name: qa
plugins.description: QA-test a website or app and return a 1-5 quality score with evidence. Drives a Browser Use cloud browser and tunnels localhost automatically. Run as /qa <url-or-localhost-port>. Requires the browser-harness CLI (the skill installs it itself if missing).
